name: Archon1
description: Robotically evolved archaerhodopsin variant with improved brightness, millisecond kinetics, and exceptional photostability for long-duration recordings.

kinetics.note: Bi-exponential fast component in HEK293T cells at 30°C, n=6 cells

dynamicRangeData.note: Per 100 mV step in HEK293T cells, n=4 cells

brightnessData.note: Reciprocal of QuasAr6a 1.7x brighter than Archon1
Reciprocal of QuasAr6b 2.0x brighter than Archon1
